H4100.derivation: or מַה; or מָ; or מַ; also מֶה; a primitive particle;
H4100.strongs_def: properly, interrogative what? (including how? why? when?); but also exclamation, what! (including how!), or indefinitely what (including whatever, and even relatively, that which); often used with prefixes in various adverbial or conjunctive senses
H4100.kjv_def: how (long, oft, (-soever)), (no-) thing, what (end, good, purpose, thing), whereby(-fore, -in, -to, -with), (for) why.

H4101.strongs_def: {properly, interrogative what? (including how? why? when?); but also exclamation, what! (including how!), or indefinitely what}
H4101.kjv_def: how great (mighty), that which, what(-soever), why.

H4102.strongs_def: properly, to question or hesitate, i.e. (by implication) to be reluctant

H4103.kjv_def: destruction, discomfiture, trouble, tumult, vexation, vexed.
H4103.usage: destruction(3x), trouble(3x), vexation(2x), tumult(2x), vexed(1x), discomfiture(1x)

H4105.derivation: from H3190 (יָטַב) (augmented) and H410 (אֵל); bettered of God;
H4105.strongs_def: Mehetabel, the name of an Edomitish man and woman
H4105.pos: proper feminine noun, proper masculine noun

H4107.strongs_def: properly, to cut down or reduce, i.e. by implication, to adulterate

H4109.strongs_def: a walk, i.e. a passage or a distance

H4111.derivation: from H4110 (מַהֲלָל) and H410 (אֵל); praise of God;
H4111.strongs_def: Mahalalel, the name of an antediluvian patriarch and of an Israelite

H4113.derivation: from an unused root of uncertain meaning;

H4116.strongs_def: properly, to be liquid or flow easily, i.e. (by implication); to hurry (in a good or a bad sense); often used (with another verb) adverbially, promptly
H4116.kjv_def: be carried headlong, fearful, (cause to make, in, make) haste(-n, -ily), (be) hasty, (fetch, make ready) [idiom] quickly, rash, [idiom] shortly, (be so) [idiom] soon, make speed, [idiom] speedily, [idiom] straightway, [idiom] suddenly, swift.
H4116.usage: haste(42x), swift(3x), quickly(3x), hastily(2x), hasty(2x), soon(2x), speed(2x), headlong(1x), rash(1x), fearful(1x), ready(1x), shortly(1x), speedily(1x), straightway(1x), suddenly(1x)

H4117.derivation: a primitive root (perhaps rather the same as H4116 (מָהַר) through the idea of readiness in assent);
H4117.strongs_def: to bargain (for a wife), i.e. to wed

H4118.kjv_def: hasteth, hastily, at once, quickly, soon, speedily, suddenly.

H4120.kjv_def: hastily, quickly, shortly, soon, make (with) speed(-ily), swiftly.
H4120.usage: quickly(10x), speedily(4x), soon(1x), swiftly(1x), hastily(1x), shortly(1x)

H4122.derivation: from H4118 (מַהֵר) and H7998 (שָׁלָל) and H2363 (חוּשׁ) and H957 (בַּז); hasting (is he (the enemy) to the) booty, swift (to the) prey;
H4122.strongs_def: Maher-Shalal-Chash-Baz; the symbolical name of the son of Isaiah

H4124.derivation: from a prolonged form of the prepositional prefix m-and H1 (אָב); from (her (the mother's)) father;
H4124.strongs_def: Moab, an incestuous son of Lot; also his territory and descendants
H4124.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H4125.derivation: feminine מוֹאָבִיָּה; or מוֹאָבִיתxlit Môwâbîyth corrected to Môwʼâbîyth; patronymical from H4124 (מוֹאָב);
H4125.strongs_def: a Moabite or Moabitess, i.e. a descendant from Moab

H4127.strongs_def: to melt, i.e. literally (to soften, flow down, disappear), or figuratively (to fear, faint)
H4127.kjv_def: consume, dissolve, (be) faint(-hearted), melt (away), make soft.
H4127.usage: melt(5x), dissolve(4x), faint(3x), consumed(1x), fainthearted(1x), soft(1x)

H4131.strongs_def: to waver; by implication, to slip, shake, fall
H4131.kjv_def: be carried, cast, be out of course, be fallen in decay, [idiom] exceedingly, fall(-ing down), be (re-) moved, be ready, shake, slide, slip.
H4131.usage: moved(20x), removed(5x), slip(3x), carried(1x), cast(1x), course(1x), decay(1x), exceedingly(1x), fall(1x), ready(1x), shaketh(1x), slide(1x), variant(1x)

H4132.strongs_def: a wavering, i.e. fall; by implication, a pole (as shaking); hence, a yoke (as essentially a bent pole)

H4133.strongs_def: a pole; by implication, an ox-bow; hence, a yoke (either literal or figurative)

H4134.strongs_def: to become thin, i.e. (figuratively) be impoverished

H4135.strongs_def: to cut short, i.e. curtail (specifically the prepuce, i.e. to circumcise); by implication, to blunt; figuratively, to destroy
H4135.kjv_def: circumcise(-ing), selves), cut down (in pieces), destroy, [idiom] must needs.

H4136.derivation: or מוֹל; (Deuteronomy 1:1), or מוֹאל; (Nehemiah 12:38), or מֻל; (Numbers 22:5), from H4135 (מוּל);
H4136.strongs_def: properly, abrupt, i.e. a precipice; by implication, the front; used only adverbially (with prepositional prefix) opposite
H4136.kjv_def: (over) against, before, (fore-) front, from, (God-) ward, toward, with.
H4136.usage: against(21x), toward(3x), before(2x), forefront(1x), from(1x), with(1x)

H4138.strongs_def: nativity (plural birth-place); by implication, lineage, native country; also offspring, family
H4138.usage: kindred(11x), nativity(6x), born(2x), begotten(1x), issue(1x), native(1x)

H4141.strongs_def: a turn, i.e. circuit (of a building)

H4142.strongs_def: a reversal, i.e. the backside (of a gem), fold (of a double-leaved door), transmutation (of a name)
H4142.kjv_def: being changed, inclosed, be set, turning.

H4147.derivation: also (in plural) feminine מוֹסֵרָה; or מֹסְרָה; from H3256 (יָסַר);
H4147.strongs_def: properly, chastisement, i.e. (by implication) a halter; figuratively, restraint

H4148.strongs_def: properly, chastisement; figuratively, reproof, warning or instruction; also restraint
H4148.kjv_def: bond, chastening(-eth), chastisement, check, correction, discipline, doctrine, instruction, rebuke.
H4148.usage: instruction(30x), correction(8x), chasten(4x), chastisement(3x), check(1x), bond(1x), discipline(1x), doctrine(1x), rebuker(1x)

H4149.derivation: or (plural) מֹסְרוֹת feminine of H4147 (מוֹסֵר); correction or corrections;
H4149.strongs_def: Moserah or Moseroth, a place in the Desert

H4150.derivation: or מֹעֵד; or (feminine) מוֹעָדָה; (2 Chronicles 8:13), from H3259 (יָעַד);
H4150.strongs_def: properly, an appointment, i.e. a fixed time or season; specifically, a festival; conventionally ayear; by implication, an assembly (as convened for a definite purpose); technically the congregation; by extension, the place of meeting; also a signal (as appointed beforehand)
H4150.kjv_def: appointed (sign, time), (place of, solemn) assembly, congregation, (set, solemn) feast, (appointed, due) season, solemn(-ity), synogogue, (set) time (appointed).
H4150.usage: congregation(150x), feast(23x), season(13x), appointed(12x), time(12x), assembly(4x), solemnity(4x), solemn(2x), days(1x), sign(1x), synagogues(1x)

H4151.strongs_def: properly, an assembly  figuratively, a troop

H4153.derivation: from H4151 (מוֹעָד) and H3050 (יָהּ); assembly of Jah;

H4154.strongs_def: properly, made to slip, i.e. dislocated

H4155.strongs_def: properly, covered, i.e. dark; abstractly, obscurity, i.e. distress

H4158.derivation: (Jeremiah 48:21) or מֵיפַעַת; or מֵפַעַת; from H3313 (יָפַע); illuminative;
H4158.strongs_def: Mophaath or Mephaath, a place in Palestine

H4159.derivation: or מֹפֵת; from H3302 (יָפָה) in the sense of conspicuousness;
H4159.strongs_def: a miracle; by implication, a token or omen

H4161.derivation: or מֹצָאxlit môtsâ corrected to môtsâʼ; from H3318 (יָצָא);
H4161.strongs_def: a going forth, i.e. (the act) an egress, or (the place) an exit; hence, a source or product; specifically, dawn, the rising of the sun (the East), exportation, utterance, a gate, a fountain, a mine, a meadow (as producing grass)
H4161.kjv_def: brought out, bud, that which came out, east, going forth, goings out, that which (thing that) is gone out, outgoing, proceeded out, spring, vein, (water-) course (springs).
H4161.usage: spring(3x), brought(2x), bud(1x), east(1x), outgoings(1x), proceeded(1x), proceedeth(1x), vein(1x), watercourse(1x)

H4162.strongs_def: Motsa, the name of two Israelites

H4163.strongs_def: a family descent; also a sewer

H4165.strongs_def: properly, fusion, i.e. literally, a casting (of metal); figuratively, a mass (of clay)

H4166.strongs_def: properly, something poured out, i.e. a casting (of metal); by implication, a tube (as cast)

H4168.strongs_def: a fire or fuel; abstractly, a conflagration

H4170.strongs_def: a noose (for catching animals) (literally or figuratively); by implication, a hook (for the nose)

H4171.strongs_def: to alter; by implication, to barter, to dispose of

H4172.derivation: or מֹרָא; or מוֹרָהxlit môrâh corrected to môwrâh; (Psalm 9:20), from H3372 (יָרֵא);
H4172.strongs_def: fear; by implication, a fearful thing or deed
H4172.kjv_def: dread, (that ought to be) fear(-ed), terribleness, terror.

H4173.derivation: or מֹרַג; from an unused root meaning to triturate;

H4174.strongs_def: a descent; as architecture, an ornamental appendage, perhaps a festoon
H4174.kjv_def: going down, steep place, thin work.

H4175.strongs_def: an archer; also teacher or teaching; also the early rain

H4176.derivation: or מֹרֶה; the same as H4175 (מוֹרֶה);
H4176.strongs_def: Moreh, a Canaanite; also a hill (perhaps named from him)

H4177.derivation: from H4171 (מוּר) in the sense of shearing;

H4179.derivation: or מֹרִיָּה; from H7200 (רָאָה) and H3050 (יָהּ); seen of Jah;

H4182.derivation: from H3423 (יָרַשׁ) and H1661 (גַּת); possession of Gath;

H4183.strongs_def: a Morashtite or inhabitant of Moresheth-Gath

H4185.derivation: a primitive root (perhaps rather the same as H4184 (מוּשׁ) through the idea of receding by contact);
H4185.strongs_def: to withdraw (both literally and figuratively, whether intransitive or transitive)
H4185.kjv_def: cease, depart, go back, remove, take away.

H4186.strongs_def: a seat; figuratively, a site; abstractly, a session; by extension an abode (the place or the time); by implication, population
H4186.kjv_def: assembly, dwell in, dwelling(-place), wherein (that) dwelt (in), inhabited place, seat, sitting, situation, sojourning.
H4186.usage: habitation(12x), dwellings(8x), seat(7x), dwelling(4x), dwellingplace(3x), dwell(3x), places(2x), sitting(2x), assembly(1x), situation(1x), sojourning(1x)

H4188.strongs_def: a Mushite (collectively) or descendants of Mushi

H4191.strongs_def: to die (literally or figuratively); causatively, to kill
H4191.kjv_def: [idiom] at all, [idiom] crying, (be) dead (body, man, one), (put to, worthy of) death, destroy(-er), (cause to, be like to, must) die, kill, necro(-mancer), [idiom] must needs, slay, [idiom] surely, [idiom] very suddenly, [idiom] in (no) wise.
H4191.usage: die(424x), dead(130x), slay(100x), death(83x), surely(50x), kill(31x)

H4192.derivation: (Psalm H48 (אֲבִירָם) or מוּת לַבֵּן; from H4191 (מוּת) and H1121 (בֵּן) with the preposition and article interposed;
H4192.strongs_def: 'To die for the son', probably the title of a popular song

H4194.strongs_def: death (natural or violent); concretely, the dead, their place or state (hades); figuratively, pestilence, ruin

H4197.derivation: from an unused root meaning to mingle (water with wine);

H4198.derivation: from an unused root meaning to suck out;

H4199.derivation: probably from an unused root meaning to faint with fear; terror;
